title: Powerful but too hard to operationalize
input_text: Zendesk is powerful, but setting up automation has been much harder than expected. We needed outside help to make routing and workflow rules usable. The product can do a lot, but our support managers do not always trust the automations because it is difficult to understand why tickets get prioritized a certain way. Agents also waste time jumping between customer history, internal notes, and billing context before replying. Reporting is decent, but getting to a reliable workflow took too long for our team.
